name: Oatmeal Bran Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup frozen apple juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix the dry ingredients together in a large bowl: Whole Wheat flour, rolled oats, oat bran, wheat bran, soy flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
3. In another bowl, mix the wet ingredients: honey, frozen apple juice concentrate (thawed), pineapple juice, raisins, chopped dates, and vanilla extract.
4. Combine the dry and wet ingredients, stirring thoroughly until a dough forms.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a nonstick baking sheet.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
